sentence: 电子从高能级跃迁到低能级。
pinyin: Diànzǐ cóng gāo néng jí yuèqiān dào dī néng jí.
english: Electrons transition from a higher energy level to a lower one.

sentence: 摄影师用无人机拍摄了壮观的航拍。
pinyin: Shèyǐngshī yòng wúrénjī pāishè le zhuànguān de hángpāi.
english: The photographer used a drone to capture spectacular aerial footage.

sentence: 他喜欢新派的管理方式。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān xīnpài de guǎnlǐ fāngshì.
english: He likes the new-school management approach.

sentence: 他用本本在咖啡馆里工作。
pinyin: Tā yòng běnběn zài kāfēiguǎn lǐ gōngzuò.
english: He works at a café using his laptop.

sentence: 爷爷在家里安详地老死，享年九十岁。
pinyin: Yé ye zài jiā lǐ ān xiáng de lǎo sǐ, xiǎng nián jiǔ shí suì.
english: Grandpa passed away peacefully at home at the age of ninety.
